description_long: This is a modern, two-story house surrounded by a wooden fence and featuring a mix of paved and grassy yards. The structure has a combination of flat and gable roofs, with a prominent garage attached to one side and a main entryway with a double door and small overhang. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of small and medium rectangular panes distributed across the facade. A large, stylized tree is present in the front yard, providing shade and visual interest. The property is enclosed, with a white picket gate at the front and a driveway leading to the garage.
description: A modern two-story house with flat and gable roofs, asymmetrical windows, a garage, and a fenced yard with a tree and paved driveway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear and side of the house, highlighting the grassy backyard, paved side area, and the large tree near the fence.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the back and opposite side, emphasizing the expanse of the backyard and the rear facade with minimal windows.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the garage side and backyard, with the driveway and garage door clearly visible, as well as the paved area and tree.
description_view_3: View 3 is the front view, showing the main entryway with double doors, the white picket gate, the paved driveway, and the tree in the front yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Double door entry with a small overhang, paved steps, and a white picket gate at the front.
